user_query:
I'm preparing a two-hour nonviolence dialogue workshop for our next peace rally, and I need your help to generate an agenda from the provided config and community concerns data, then compile clear meeting notes with concrete action items for our teams.

Please do the following in this workspace:

1) Inspect the files scripts/build_agenda.py and config/workshop_config.json to confirm how the script enforces the time cap. The script reads the "max_minutes" field from the JSON and scales module durations to fit. Change config/workshop_config.json to set "max_minutes" to 120 minutes (if it is not already), so the final agenda fits within two hours. Do not modify the Python script.

2) Run the script to generate the agenda and prioritized concerns summary:
   - Command: python3 scripts/build_agenda.py --config config/workshop_config.json --concerns data/concerns.csv --out output
   - This must produce both output/agenda.md and output/topics.json. The agenda file should include the adjusted durations and a line with the "Total scheduled minutes". Ensure that total is <= 120.

3) Prepare meeting notes for our planning committee based on the generated artifacts. Save them to output/meeting_notes.md with the following required sections and content:
   - Overview: Include the event title and proposed date from config/workshop_config.json.
   - Agenda summary: List each workshop module (title, adjusted duration, and facilitator) as reflected in output/agenda.md.
   - Time cap confirmation: State the exact "Total scheduled minutes" value from output/agenda.md and explicitly confirm it is <= 120.
   - Top community concerns: Using output/topics.json, include the three top categories with each category’s top concern.
   - Action items: Provide at least two concrete action items each for the Youth Team, Outreach Team, and De-escalation Team. At least one item per team must directly reference one of the top concern categories from output/topics.json, and each item must include a due date on or before the proposed date from the config.
   - Risk and mitigation: Identify any modules flagged as risky (as indicated in output/agenda.md/config) and propose at least one mitigation step for each.

Deliverables required:
- output/agenda.md (generated by the script)
- output/topics.json (generated by the script)
- output/meeting_notes.md (prepared by you, meeting the section/content requirements above)

Please keep tool choices simple (just Python and standard libraries), and do not add external dependencies. The script must remain unmodified; adjust only the configuration as needed to meet the 120-minute cap. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
